creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=beastie.4th&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-current> for 13.0-CURRENT: 

>      beastie.4th -- FreeBSD ASCII art boot module

I no longer see ASCII art. 

In addition to updating the manual page, it may be worth mentioning the enhancement in release notes for upcoming 13.0.
